name: tri-state-relay-service
description: Local macOS agent voicemail queue with serialized speech playback.

scripts.build:native: mkdir -p dist/native && perry compile src/cli.ts -o dist/native/voicemail && perry compile src/processor.ts -o dist/native/voicemail-processor
scripts.build:macos: npm run build:native && mkdir -p dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS && cp src/macos/Info.plist dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/Info.plist && swiftc -parse-as-library src/macos/TriStateRelayService.swift -o dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service && cp dist/native/voicemail dist/native/voicemail-processor dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS/
scripts.validate: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run perry:check && npm run build
